plugins.verifyReleaseCmd: HEXALITH_REQUIRE_CONTAINER_PUBLISHER=true bash scripts/validate-release-secrets.sh && bash scripts/validate-release-authority.sh ${nextRelease.version} verify >&2
plugins.publishCmd: HEXALITH_REQUIRE_CONTAINER_PUBLISHER=true bash scripts/validate-release-secrets.sh && bash scripts/validate-release-authority.sh ${nextRelease.version} publish >&2 && dotnet nuget push "./nupkgs/Hexalith.EventStore.*.nupkg" --source https://api.nuget.org/v3/index.json --api-key "$NUGET_API_KEY" && ./.hexalith/release/publish-containers.sh ${nextRelease.version}
